name: Vision & OCR Pipeline
description: Progressive vision pipeline with PaddleOCR, TrOCR, Florence-2, CLIP, and cloud vision (GPT-4o, Claude).

extensions.description: Extract text and understand images using a progressive multi-tier vision pipeline

requiredSecrets.description: OpenAI API key for GPT-4o vision fallback

features: Printed text OCR via PaddleOCR (local, offline)
CLIP embeddings for semantic image search
